prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为约18453、21136、20672、23596、35579名，整体呈持续后移趋势，近4年累计后移约17126名；2025年位次大幅下滑至35579名 ，主要受部分冷门专业组（再选不限）断档影响，属异常波动，2025年基准约35579名；该校在湖北省物理类招生计划2021年78人、2022年83人、2023年80人、2 024年79人、2025年76人；2026年计划83人，较2025年扩招约9.2%，扩招幅度较大，对竞争有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 云南大学为211工程、国家双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜排名近年持续上升，2026年位列第71名，在综合类高校中处于中上游水平；2025年声誉评价偏负面，主要因生命科学学院就业率数据引发关注 ，对报考心理有一定抑制；抖音综合热度排名第62，评价为一般，短视频曝光量处于中等水平，未见明显升温信号；第五轮学科评估中，民族学获评A+、生态学 获评A、统计学获评A-，在西南地区高校中学科实力突出；生态学、统计学等优势学科与物理类招生专业（生态学菁英班、统计学等）直接关联。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机 类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等物理类主要专业方向在2024–2026年持续高热推荐，报考热度较高；湖北省2026年高考总报名人数约393700人，较2025年略有增加，竞争压力小幅 上升；云南大学位于云南省昆明市，距湖北省较远，跨省就读的地域偏好对湖北考生报考意愿有一定抑制作用；该校在湖北省招 生计划占比较小，属跨省招生。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次异常断档后的自然回升预期、2026年扩招约9.2%的缓解效应、以及湖北省考生总数小幅增加带来的竞争压力，预 计2026年物理类最低位次将较2025年明显回升（位次数字减小），但受声誉偏负面和跨省地域因素制约，回升幅度有限；预测最低位次约33790名，区间33290–34290名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间33290–34290名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报方向，一档专业可作为冲刺选择（尤其计算机类、临床医学等热门专业需位次更优），三档专业作为保底。位次明 显优于区间上限（如32000名以内）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 18453, 21136, 20672, 23596, and 35579 respectively, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 17126 places in the past 4 years; in 2025, the ranking dropped sharply to 35579, mainly due to the gap effect of some unpopular major groups (no re-selection restrictions), which is an abnormal fluctuation, with the 2025 baseline around 35579; the enrollment plan for this university in Hubei Province for Physics Category was 78 in 2021, 83 in 2022, 80 in 2023, 79 in 2024, and 76 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 83, an increase of about 9.2% compared to 2025, a relatively large expansion, which has a certain alleviating effect on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Yunnan University is a 211 Project and national Double First-Class construction university; its ranking on the Soft Science China University Main Ranking has been rising in recent years, ranking 71st in 2026, placing it in the upper-middle level among comprehensive universities; the reputation evaluation in 2025 was relatively negative, mainly due to concerns raised by the employment rate data of the School of Life Sciences, which has a certain inhibitory effect on application psychology; the comprehensive popularity ranking on Douyin is 62nd, rated as average, with short video exposure at a medium level, showing no obvious warming signal; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Ethnology received A+, Ecology received A, and Statistics received A-, highlighting outstanding disciplinary strength among universities in the Southwest region; advantageous disciplines such as Ecology and Statistics are directly related to Physics Category enrollment majors (Ecology Elite Class, Statistics, etc.).

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and other main major directions in Physics Category have been highly recommended from 2024 to 2026, with high application popularity; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Hubei Gaokao is about 393,700, a slight increase from 2025, leading to a slight rise in competition pressure; Yunnan University is located in Kunming, Yunnan Province, far from Hubei Province, and the regional preference for cross-province study has a certain inhibitory effect on the application willingness of Hubei candidates; the enrollment plan for this university in Hubei Province accounts for a small proportion, belonging to cross-province enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the expected natural rebound after the abnormal gap in 2025 rankings, the alleviating effect of the 9.2% enrollment expansion in 2026, and the increased competition pressure from a slight increase in the total number of candidates in Hubei Province, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will significantly rebound (ranking number decreases) compared to 2025, but due to the negative reputation and cross-province regional factors, the rebound is limited; the predicted minimum ranking is about 33790, with a range of 33290–34290.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 33290–34290, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main application direction, Tier 1 majors can be used as a sprint choice (especially popular majors like Computer Science and Clinical Medicine require better rankings), and Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If the ranking is significantly better than the upper limit of the range (e.g., within 32000), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 3878, 4108, 4236, 5797, and 4835, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend; after a significant drop to 5797 in 2024, it rebounded to 4835 in 2025, indicating some elasticity; the baseline for 2025 is approximately 4835; the enrollment plan for History Category in Hubei Province was 23 in 2021, 26 in 2022, 27 in 2023, 28 in 2024, and 20 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 21, a slight expansion of 5% compared to 2025, with limited expansion.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Yunnan University is a Project 211 and national Double First-Class university; in the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking, it ranks 71st, with a steadily rising ranking in recent years, placing it in the upper-middle tier nationally; the 2025 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly due to employment data from the School of Life Sciences attracting attention, which has a certain inhibitory effect on overall application psychology; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 62, rated as average, with no significant popularity fluctuations; Ethnology is rated A+ (top nationally), which has some relevance to History Category majors such as Sociology and Political Science and Administration; Ecology A and Statistics A- are also advantageous disciplines of the university.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Law, Chinese Language and Literature, and other main History Category majors have a social popularity rating of recommended to slightly hot, while teacher/education categories are differentiated and wait-and-see; the total number of Hubei Province college entrance examination registrants in 2026 is approximately 393,700, a slight increase from 2025, with the scale of History Category candidates expected to rise slightly, leading to slightly intensified competition; Yunnan University is located in Kunming, far from Hubei, and the geographical preference for cross-province study has a certain inhibitory effect on the willingness of Hubei History Category candidates to apply; the university has a small enrollment plan for History Category in Hubei, typical of cross-province enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the rebound trend in 2025 rankings, the mitigating effect of a slight 5% expansion in 2026, and the increased competition pressure from the rise in total Hubei candidates, it is expected that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will be slightly lower than in 2025 (ranking number slightly larger); the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 5030, with a range of 4530–5530.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 4400), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors.
